'''zhongamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lymphatical|lymphatical]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lymphatical|lymphatical]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhongamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongamithi|zhongamithi]] || [[word:zhongamiji|zhongamiji]] || [[word:zhongamishi|zhongamishi]] || [[word:zhongamiki|zhongamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongamuthuthu|zhongamuthuthu]] || [[word:zhongamujuju|zhongamujuju]] || [[word:zhongamushushu|zhongamushushu]] || [[word:zhongamukuku|zhongamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongamuthu|zhongamuthu]] || [[word:zhongamuju|zhongamuju]] || [[word:zhongamushu|zhongamushu]] || [[word:zhongamuku|zhongamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongamufthuf|zhongamufthuf]] || [[word:zhongamufjuf|zhongamufjuf]] || [[word:zhongamufshuf|zhongamufshuf]] || [[word:zhongamufkuf|zhongamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongamethe|zhongamethe]] || [[word:zhongameje|zhongameje]] || [[word:zhongameshe|zhongameshe]] || [[word:zhongameke|zhongameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongamothotho|zhongamothotho]] || [[word:zhongamojojo|zhongamojojo]] || [[word:zhongamoshosho|zhongamoshosho]] || [[word:zhongamokoko|zhongamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongamotho|zhongamotho]] || [[word:zhongamojo|zhongamojo]] || [[word:zhongamosho|zhongamosho]] || [[word:zhongamoko|zhongamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongamofthof|zhongamofthof]] || [[word:zhongamofjof|zhongamofjof]] || [[word:zhongamofshof|zhongamofshof]] || [[word:zhongamofkof|zhongamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongamĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongamĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongamĂŠthĂŠ|zhongamĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhongamĂŠjĂŠ|zhongamĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhongamĂŠshĂŠ|zhongamĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhongamĂŠkĂŠ|zhongamĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongamathatha|zhongamathatha]] || [[word:zhongamajaja|zhongamajaja]] || [[word:zhongamashasha|zhongamashasha]] || [[word:zhongamakaka|zhongamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongamatha|zhongamatha]] || [[word:zhongamaja|zhongamaja]] || [[word:zhongamasha|zhongamasha]] || [[word:zhongamaka|zhongamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongamafthaf|zhongamafthaf]] || [[word:zhongamafjaf|zhongamafjaf]] || [[word:zhongamafshaf|zhongamafshaf]] || [[word:zhongamafkaf|zhongamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhongamasha|zhongamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhongamshĂ«sha|zhongamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhongamrosha|zhongamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhongamusha|zhongamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhongamyasha|zhongamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhongamnkshĂ«sha|gozhongamnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhongamnkrosha|gozhongamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhongamnkmusha|gozhongamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhongamnkyasha|gozhongamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhongangamasha|zhongangamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhongangamshĂ«sha|zhongangamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhongangamrosha|zhongangamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhongangamusha|zhongangamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhongangamyasha|zhongangamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhongangamnkshĂ«sha|gozhongangamnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhongangamnkrosha|gozhongangamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhongangamnkmusha|gozhongangamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhongangamnkyasha|gozhongangamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhengĂŠmasha|zhengĂŠmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhengĂŠmshĂ«sha|zhengĂŠmshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhengĂŠmrosha|zhengĂŠmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhengĂŠmusha|zhengĂŠmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhengĂŠmyasha|zhengĂŠmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠmnkshĂ«sha|gozhengĂŠmnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠmnkrosha|gozhengĂŠmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠmnkmusha|gozhengĂŠmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠmnkyasha|gozhengĂŠmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhongfamasha|zhongfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhongfamshĂ«sha|zhongfamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhongfamrosha|zhongfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhongfamusha|zhongfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhongfamyasha|zhongfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhongfamnkshĂ«sha|gozhongfamnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhongfamnkrosha|gozhongfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhongfamnkmusha|gozhongfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhongfamnkyasha|gozhongfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
